description: Defines an AppTheme class that provides a static method to generate a ThemeData object with custom color scheme and styling for a Flutter application.

classes.name: AppTheme
classes.description: A utility class providing theme configurations for a Flutter app, specifically a static method for a light retro theme.

methods.name: lightRetro
methods.description: Returns a ThemeData object configured with a color scheme and styling properties for a light retro theme.
